questions.question: 1. When magma comes out of the earth, it is called: / जब मैग्मा पृथ्वी से बाहर आता है, तो उसे कहते हैं:
questions.explanation: Magma is molten rock inside the Earth; lava is molten rock on the surface.

questions.question: 2. What is the main cause of volcanoes mentioned in the text? / पाठ में उल्लिखित ज्वालामुखियों का मुख्य कारण क्या है?
options: Tectonic plate movement / टेक्टोनिक प्लेटों की गति
questions.explanation: The text states that volcanoes are due to tectonic plate movement.

questions.question: 3. The process by which gases are released from a volcano is called: / वह प्रक्रिया जिसके द्वारा ज्वालामुखी से गैसें निकलती हैं, कहलाती है:
questions.explanation: Degassing is the release of dissolved gases from magma as it rises.

questions.question: 4. Which of the following types of volcanic eruptions of Earth's volcanoes are most explosive? / पृथ्वी के ज्वालामुखियों में निम्नलिखित में से किस प्रकार का ज्वालामुखी उद्गार सबसे अधिक विस्फोटक होता है? [SSC MTS 2024]
questions.explanation: Calderas are the most explosive volcanoes, often collapsing to form a bowl-shaped depression.

questions.question: 5. A Caldera is a: / काल्डेरा एक:
options: Bowl shaped depression / कटोरे के आकार का गर्त
Type of rock / चट्टान का प्रकार
questions.explanation: A caldera is a large, bowl-shaped volcanic depression formed after a major eruption.

questions.question: 6. The 'Rings of fire' (Rings of volcanoes) are found in which ocean? / 'रिंग्स ऑफ फायर' (ज्वालामुखियों का वलय) किस महासागर में पाए जाते हैं?
questions.explanation: The Pacific Ocean basin is known for its high volcanic and seismic activity, called the Ring of Fire.

questions.question: 7. Kilauea volcano is located in which country? / किलाउआ ज्वालामुखी किस देश में स्थित है?
questions.explanation: Kilauea, located in Hawaii, is one of the most active volcanoes in the USA.

questions.question: 8. Stromboli volcano is located in which country? / स्ट्रोम्बोली ज्वालामुखी किस देश में स्थित है?
questions.explanation: Stromboli is an active volcano in Italy, known as the "Lighthouse of the Mediterranean".

questions.question: 9. Fujiyama volcano is located in which country? / फुजियामा ज्वालामुखी किस देश में स्थित है?
questions.explanation: Mount Fujiyama (Mt. Fuji) is an active volcano and the highest peak in Japan.

questions.question: 10. Barren Island volcano is located in which country? / बैरेन द्वीप ज्वालामुखी किस देश में स्थित है?
questions.explanation: Barren Island, in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands, is India's only active volcano.

questions.question: 11. Cotopaxi volcano is located in which country? / कोटोपैक्सी ज्वालामुखी किस देश में स्थित है?
questions.explanation: Cotopaxi is one of the world's highest active volcanoes, located in Ecuador.

questions.question: 12. Ojos-del-salado volcano is located on the border of: / ओजोस-डेल-सलाडो ज्वालामुखी किसकी सीमा पर स्थित है?
questions.explanation: Ojos-del-salado is an active volcano on the border of Argentina and Chile.

questions.question: 13. Which of the following is an Active Volcano? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा एक सक्रिय ज्वालामुखी है?
questions.explanation: Stromboli is listed as an active volcano, while Vesuvius and Krakatoa are dormant.

questions.question: 14. Vesuvius volcano, located in Italy, is an example of: / इटली में स्थित विसुवियस ज्वालामुखी, किसका एक उदाहरण है:
questions.explanation: Mount Vesuvius is famous for destroying Pompeii and is classified as a dormant volcano.

questions.question: 15. Krakatoa volcano is located in which country? / क्राकाटोआ ज्वालामुखी किस देश में स्थित है?
questions.explanation: Krakatoa is a dormant volcano in Indonesia, known for its massive 1883 eruption.

questions.question: 16. Narcondam Island, located in India, is an example of: / भारत में स्थित नारकोंडम द्वीप, किसका एक उदाहरण है:
questions.explanation: Narcondam Island (Andaman) is classified as a dormant volcano, unlike the active Barren Island.

questions.question: 17. Which is India's *only* active volcano? / भारत का *एकमात्र* सक्रिय ज्वालामुखी कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Barren Island in the Andaman Islands is the only confirmed active volcano in South Asia.

questions.question: 18. Which is an example of a dormant volcano in India? / भारत में प्रसुप्त ज्वालामुखी का उदाहरण कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Narcondam Island is listed as a dormant volcano, whereas Barren Island is active.

questions.question: 19. Which of the following is an Active Volcano? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा एक सक्रिय ज्वालामुखी है?
questions.explanation: Kilauea is an active volcano, while the others listed are dormant.

questions.question: 20. Which of the following is a Dormant Volcano? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा एक प्रसुप्त ज्वालामुखी है?
questions.explanation: Vesuvius is classified as dormant, while Stromboli, Fujiyama, and Barren Island are active.

questions.question: 21. Cotopaxi (Ecuador) and Ojos-del-salado are examples of: / कोटोपैक्सी (इक्वाडोर) और ओजोस-डेल-सलाडो किसके उदाहरण हैं:
questions.explanation: Both Cotopaxi and Ojos-del-salado are listed as active volcanoes.

questions.question: 22. Fujiyama (Japan) and Stromboli (Italy) are examples of: / फुजियामा (जापान) और स्ट्रोम्बोली (इटली) किसके उदाहरण हैं:
questions.explanation: Both Fujiyama and Stromboli are classified as active volcanoes.

questions.question: 23. A volcano that has not erupted recently but may erupt again is: / एक ज्वालामुखी जो हाल ही में नहीं फटा है लेकिन फिर से फट सकता है:
questions.explanation: Dormant volcanoes are 'sleeping' but have the potential to erupt in the future.

questions.question: 24. A volcano that is unlikely to erupt again is called: / एक ज्वालामुखी जिसके फिर से फटने की संभावना नहीं है, कहलाता है:
questions.explanation: An extinct, or dead, volcano is one that scientists believe will not erupt again.

questions.question: 25. The study of rocks is called: / चट्टानों के अध्ययन को कहते हैं:
questions.explanation: Petrology is the branch of geology that studies rocks and the conditions under which they form.

questions.question: 26. How many main types of rocks are mentioned? / कितने मुख्य प्रकार की चट्टानों का उल्लेख किया गया है?
questions.explanation: The three main types are Igneous, Sedimentary, and Metamorphic rocks.

questions.question: 27. Which of the following is NOT one of the three main types of rock? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा चट्टान के तीन मुख्य प्रकारों में से एक नहीं है?
questions.explanation: Plutonic rock is a *sub-type* of Igneous rock, not one of the three main categories.

questions.question: 28. Which type of rock is formed by the solidification of lava or magma? / किस प्रकार की चट्टान लावा या मैग्मा के जमने (सॉलिडिफिकेशन) से बनती है?
questions.explanation: Igneous rocks are formed from the cooling and solidification of molten rock.

questions.question: 29. Igneous rocks are divided into how many types? / आग्नेय चट्टानों को कितने प्रकारों में बांटा गया है?
questions.explanation: The two types of igneous rock are Intrusive (Plutonic) and Extrusive (Volcanic).

questions.question: 30. Intrusive igneous rocks are also known as: / अंतर्वेधी (Intrusive) आग्नेय चट्टानों को इस नाम से भी जाना जाता है:
questions.explanation: Intrusive rocks form deep within the Earth, hence the name Plutonic (after Pluto, god of the underworld).

questions.question: 31. Extrusive igneous rocks are also known as: / बहिरर्वेधी (Extrusive) आग्नेय चट्टानों को इस नाम से भी जाना जाता है:
options: Lava or Volcanic rocks / लावा या ज्वालामुखीय चट्टानें
questions.explanation: Extrusive rocks form from lava (magma that *exits* the surface), hence the name Volcanic.

questions.question: 32. Plutonic rocks are formed when lava cools: / प्लूटोनिक चट्टानें तब बनती हैं जब लावा ठंडा होता है: [SSC MTS 2024]
questions.explanation: Plutonic (Intrusive) rocks are formed when magma cools *inside* (in) the Earth's crust.

questions.question: 33. Volcanic (Extrusive) rocks are formed when: / ज्वालामुखीय (बहिरर्वेधी) चट्टानें तब बनती हैं जब:
options: Lava cools on the surface / लावा सतह पर ठंडा होता है
Magma cools in the crust / मैग्मा पर्पटी में ठंडा होता है
Sediments are compacted / अवसाद संकुचित होते हैं
Rocks undergo chemical changes / चट्टानों में रासायनिक परिवर्तन होते हैं
questions.explanation: Extrusive or Volcanic rocks form from the rapid cooling of lava on the Earth's surface.

questions.question: 34. Gabbro is an example of which type of rocks? / गैब्रो किस प्रकार की चट्टानों का उदाहरण है? [SSC MTS 2024]
questions.explanation: Gabbro is a (plutonic) igneous rock, formed from the slow cooling of magma.

questions.question: 35. Granite is an example of which type of rock? / ग्रेनाइट किस प्रकार की चट्टान का उदाहरण है?
questions.explanation: Granite is a common Intrusive (Plutonic) Igneous rock.

questions.question: 36. Basalt is an example of which type of rock? / बेसाल्ट किस प्रकार की चट्टान का उदाहरण है?
questions.explanation: Basalt is a common Extrusive (Volcanic) Igneous rock, formed from cooled lava.

questions.question: 37. Pumice is an example of which type of rock? / प्यूमिस किस प्रकार की चट्टान का उदाहरण है?
questions.explanation: Pumice is a volcanic (extrusive igneous) rock so light (full of gas bubbles) that it can float.

questions.question: 38. Which igneous rock is known to float on water? / कौन सी आग्नेय चट्टान पानी पर तैरने के लिए जानी जाती है?
questions.explanation: Pumice is a very light, porous volcanic rock that forms during explosive eruptions and can float.

questions.question: 39. The core of the great Himalaya is made up of: / महान हिमालय का कोर (क्रोड) किससे बना है:
questions.explanation: The text states that the core of the great Himalaya is made up of (igneous) granite rock.

questions.question: 40. Gabbro and Granite are examples of: / गैब्रो और ग्रेनाइट किसके उदाहरण हैं:
questions.explanation: Both Gabbro and Granite are listed as examples of Igneous rocks, and they form *inside* the crust (Intrusive).

questions.question: 41. Basalt and Pumice are examples of: / बेसाल्ट और प्यूमिस किसके उदाहरण हैं:
questions.explanation: Both Basalt and Pumice are listed as Igneous rocks, and they form *on* the surface (Extrusive).

questions.question: 42. Sedimentary rocks are formed by the process of deposition and compaction... This process is called: / अवसादी चट्टानें विभिन्न आकारों की चट्टानों के टुकड़ों के जमाव और संघनन की प्रक्रिया से बनती हैं। इस प्रक्रिया को कहते हैं: [SSC MTS 2024]
questions.explanation: Lithification is the process where sediments compact under pressure and turn into sedimentary rock.

questions.question: 43. Fuels that are derived from fossils are preserved only in which kind of rocks? / जीवाश्मों से प्राप्त ईंधन केवल किस प्रकार की चट्टानों में संरक्षित होते हैं? [SSC MTS 2024]
questions.explanation: Fossil fuels (oil, gas, coal) are formed from organic remains trapped in sedimentary layers.

questions.question: 44. Oil and Natural gases (Fossil Fuels) are found in: / तेल और प्राकृतिक गैस (जीवाश्म ईंधन) पाए जाते हैं:
questions.explanation: Sedimentary rocks are the only type that can preserve fossils, including fossil fuels.

questions.question: 45. The study of Fossils is called: / जीवाश्मों के अध्ययन को कहते हैं:
questions.explanation: Paleontology is the scientific study of life forms (fossils) from past geologic periods.

questions.question: 46. Layers of varying thickness are found in which type of rock? / अलग-अलग मोटाई की परतें किस प्रकार की चट्टान में पाई जाती हैं? [SSC MTS 2024]
questions.explanation: Sedimentary rocks are formed by the deposition of sediments in layers (strata) over time.

questions.question: 47. Limestone is an example of: / चूना पत्थर (Limestone) किसका एक उदाहरण है:
questions.explanation: Limestone is a common sedimentary rock formed from marine organisms.

questions.question: 48. Sandstone is an example of: / बलुआ पत्थर (Sandstone) किसका एक उदाहरण है:
questions.explanation: Sandstone is a classic sedimentary rock formed from cemented sand grains.

questions.question: 49. Coal is an example of: / कोयला (Coal) किसका एक उदाहरण है:
questions.explanation: Coal is an organic sedimentary rock formed from compressed plant matter.

questions.question: 50. Chalk is an example of: / चाक (Chalk) किसका एक उदाहरण है:
questions.explanation: Chalk is a soft, white limestone (sedimentary rock) formed from microscopic marine plankton.

questions.question: 51. Halite (Rock Salt) is an example of: / हैलाइट (सेंधा नमक) किसका एक उदाहरण है:
questions.explanation: Halite is a chemical sedimentary rock formed by the evaporation of saline water.

questions.question: 52. Which of the following is an example of a Sedimentary rock? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा अवसादी चट्टान का उदाहरण है?
questions.explanation: Limestone is sedimentary, while granite, basalt, and gabbro are igneous.

questions.question: 53. Which of the following is an example of an Igneous rock? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा आग्नेय चट्टान का उदाहरण है?
questions.explanation: Granite is igneous, while sandstone, coal, and chalk are sedimentary.

questions.question: 54. Which rock is formed from the transformation of Igneous and Sedimentary rocks? / कौन सी चट्टान आग्नेय और अवसादी चट्टानों के रूपांतरण से बनती है?
questions.explanation: Metamorphic rocks form when existing rocks (igneous or sedimentary) are changed by heat and pressure.

questions.question: 55. The original non-metamorphic rock that undergoes... changes... to form a metamorphic rock is known as: / मूल गैर-कायांतरित चट्टान जिसमें ... परिवर्तन होते हैं ... जिससे कायांतरित चट्टान बनती है, कहलाती है: [SSC MTS 2024]
questions.explanation: A protolith is the original rock (igneous, sedimentary) that gets metamorphosed.

questions.question: 56. The formation of metamorphic rock from a protolith involves: / एक प्रोटोलिथ से कायांतरित चट्टान के निर्माण में शामिल है:
options: Physical changes & Chemical changes / भौतिक परिवर्तन और रासायनिक परिवर्तन
questions.explanation: The protolith process involves intense physical (pressure) and chemical (heat) changes.

questions.question: 57. The igneous, sedimentary and metamorphic rocks are interconvertible through a continuous process called: / आग्नेय, अवसादी और कायांतरित चट्टानें एक सतत प्रक्रिया के माध्यम से परस्पर परिवर्तनीय होती हैं, जिसे कहते हैं: [SSC MTS 2024]
questions.explanation: The rock cycle describes the continuous transformation of rocks from one type to another.

questions.question: 58. In the rock cycle, Igneous rock can be broken down by Erosion to form: / शैल चक्र में, आग्नेय चट्टान अपरदन (Erosion) द्वारा टूटकर बन सकती है:
questions.explanation: The diagram shows Igneous Rock undergoing Erosion to become Sedimentary Rock.

questions.question: 59. In the rock cycle, Sedimentary rock can be changed by Pressure (and heat) to form: / शैल चक्र में, अवसादी चट्टान दाब (और ऊष्मा) द्वारा परिवर्तित होकर बन सकती है:
questions.explanation: The diagram shows Sedimentary Rock undergoing Pressure to become Metamorphic Rock.

questions.question: 60. What is Petrology the study of? / पेट्रोलॉजी किसका अध्ययन है?
questions.explanation: Petrology is the specific branch of geology that studies rocks.

questions.question: 61. What is Paleontology the study of? / पेलियोन्टोलॉजी किसका अध्ययन है?
questions.explanation: Paleontology is the study of fossils to understand past life.

questions.question: 62. Which rock type is characterized by layers (strata)? / किस प्रकार की चट्टान की विशेषता परतें (strata) होती हैं?
questions.explanation: Layers are the defining characteristic of sedimentary rocks, formed by deposition over time.

questions.question: 63. Which rock type contains fossil fuels like oil and gas? / किस प्रकार की चट्टान में तेल और गैस जैसे जीवाश्म ईंधन होते हैं?
questions.explanation: Only sedimentary rocks form in conditions that can preserve organic matter to create fossil fuels.

questions.question: 64. Which of these is an example of an Extrusive (Volcanic) Igneous rock? / इनमें से कौन सा बहिरर्वेधी (ज्वालामुखी) आग्नेय चट्टान का उदाहरण है?
questions.explanation: Basalt forms from lava cooling *outside* the crust. Granite and Gabbro are intrusive.

questions.question: 65. Which of these is an example of an Intrusive (Plutonic) Igneous rock? / इनमें से कौन सा अंतर्वेधी (प्लूटोनिक) आग्नेय चट्टान का उदाहरण है?
questions.explanation: Granite forms from magma cooling *inside* the crust. Basalt and Pumice are extrusive.

questions.question: 66. What is the original rock (before metamorphism) called? / (कायांतरण से पहले) मूल चट्टान को क्या कहा जाता है?
questions.explanation: The protolith is the parent rock that undergoes metamorphism.

questions.question: 67. The process of forming sedimentary rock is: / अवसादी चट्टान बनने की प्रक्रिया है:
questions.explanation: Lithification involves compaction and cementation of sediments. Solidification forms igneous rocks.

questions.question: 68. The process of forming igneous rock is: / आग्नेय चट्टान बनने की प्रक्रिया है:
questions.explanation: Solidification (cooling and hardening) of magma or lava forms igneous rocks.

questions.question: 69. The process of forming metamorphic rock is: / कायांतरित चट्टान बनने की प्रक्रिया है:
options: Protolith Process (Physical/Chemical changes) / प्रोटोलिथ प्रक्रिया (भौतिक/रासायनिक परिवर्तन)
questions.explanation: Metamorphism (Protolith process) involves changing an existing rock with heat and pressure.

questions.question: 70. Which Italian volcano is Active? / कौन सा इतालवी ज्वालामुखी सक्रिय है?
options: Etna (not in text) / एटना (पाठ में नहीं)
questions.explanation: The text lists Stromboli as Active and Vesuvius as Dormant (both in Italy).

questions.question: 71. Which Italian volcano is Dormant? / कौन सा इतालवी ज्वालामुखी प्रसुप्त है?
questions.explanation: The text lists Vesuvius as Dormant, while Stromboli is Active.

questions.question: 72. Which Indian volcano is Active? / कौन सा भारतीय ज्वालामुखी सक्रिय है?
questions.explanation: The text identifies Barren Island as India's active volcano.

questions.question: 73. Which Indian volcano is Dormant? / कौन सा भारतीय ज्वालामुखी प्रसुप्त है?
questions.explanation: The text identifies Narcondam Island as a dormant volcano in India.

questions.question: 74. Which of these is NOT an igneous rock? / इनमें से कौन सी आग्नेय चट्टान नहीं है?
questions.explanation: Sandstone is a sedimentary rock. The others are all igneous.

questions.question: 75. Which of these is NOT a sedimentary rock? / इनमें से कौन सी अवसादी चट्टान नहीं है?
questions.explanation: Basalt is an igneous rock. The others are all sedimentary.

questions.question: 76. What is the term for molten rock *inside* the Earth? / पृथ्वी के *अंदर* पिघली हुई चट्टान के लिए क्या शब्द है?
questions.explanation: It is called magma when it is beneath the surface and lava when it erupts.

questions.question: 77. What is the term for molten rock *on the surface* of the Earth? / पृथ्वी की *सतह पर* पिघली हुई चट्टान के लिए क्या शब्द है?
questions.explanation: Lava is the name for magma once it has erupted onto the Earth's surface.

questions.question: 78. The most explosive type of volcano, forming a bowl-shaped depression, is: / सबसे विस्फोटक प्रकार का ज्वालामुखी, जो कटोरे के आकार का गर्त बनाता है, वह है:
questions.explanation: Calderas are formed by massive, explosive eruptions that cause the volcano to collapse.

questions.question: 79. Kilauea (USA) and Fujiyama (Japan) are: / किलाउआ (यूएसए) और फुजियामा (जापान) हैं:
questions.explanation: Both are listed in the text as examples of active volcanoes.

questions.question: 80. Vesuvius (Italy) and Krakatoa (Indonesia) are: / विसुवियस (इटली) और क्राकाटोआ (इंडोनेशिया) हैं:
questions.explanation: Both are listed in the text as examples of dormant volcanoes.

questions.question: 81. "Plutonic" rocks are: / "प्लूटोनिक" चट्टानें हैं:
questions.explanation: Plutonic is another name for Intrusive igneous rocks that cool slowly deep underground.

questions.question: 82. "Volcanic" rocks are: / "ज्वालामुखीय" चट्टानें हैं:
questions.explanation: Volcanic is another name for Extrusive igneous rocks that cool quickly on the surface.

questions.question: 83. Which rock forms from the solidification of *magma* (inside the crust)? / कौन सी चट्टान *मैग्मा* (पर्पटी के अंदर) के जमने से बनती है?
questions.explanation: Intrusive rocks form from magma cooling slowly *inside* the Earth.

questions.question: 84. Which rock forms from the solidification of *lava* (on the surface)? / कौन सी चट्टान *लावा* (सतह पर) के जमने से बनती है?
questions.explanation: Extrusive rocks form from lava cooling quickly *on* the surface.

questions.question: 85. Which of the following is an Igneous rock? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन सी एक आग्नेय चट्टान है?
questions.explanation: Gabbro is an igneous rock; the others are sedimentary.

questions.question: 86. Which of the following is a Sedimentary rock? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन सी एक अवसादी चट्टान है?
questions.explanation: Chalk is a sedimentary rock; the others are igneous.

questions.question: 87. Which of the following is also called a 'Dead Volcano'? / निम्नलिखित में से किसे 'मृत ज्वालामुखी' भी कहा जाता है?
questions.explanation: An extinct volcano is considered 'dead' as it is not expected to erupt again.

questions.question: 88. The core of the Great Himalaya is composed of which plutonic rock? / महान हिमालय का कोर किस प्लूटोनिक चट्टान से बना है?
questions.explanation: Granite is an intrusive (plutonic) rock, mentioned as the core of the Great Himalaya.

questions.question: 89. Which rock is formed from the 'Protolith Process'? / कौन सी चट्टान 'प्रोटोलिथ प्रक्रिया' से बनती है?
questions.explanation: The protolith process involves physical and chemical changes that turn a protolith into a metamorphic rock.

questions.question: 90. The transformation of rocks from one type to another is called: / चट्टानों का एक प्रकार से दूसरे प्रकार में रूपांतरण कहलाता है:
questions.explanation: The Rock Cycle is the continuous process of interconversion between the three rock types.

questions.question: 91. Which rock type is associated with 'Lithification'? / कौन सा चट्टान प्रकार 'लिथिफिकेशन' से संबंधित है?
questions.explanation: Lithification is the specific process that forms sedimentary rocks from sediments.

questions.question: 92. Which rock type is associated with 'Solidification' of magma/lava? / कौन सा चट्टान प्रकार मैग्मा/लावा के 'सॉलिडिफिकेशन' से संबंधित है?
questions.explanation: Solidification (cooling) of molten rock is the definition of igneous rock formation.

questions.question: 93. Coal and Halite are examples of: / कोयला और हैलाइट किसके उदाहरण हैं:
questions.explanation: Both are listed as examples of sedimentary rocks (one organic, one chemical).

questions.question: 94. Limestone and Sandstone are examples of: / चूना पत्थर और बलुआ पत्थर किसके उदाहरण हैं:
questions.explanation: Both are classic examples of sedimentary rocks.

questions.question: 95. Granite and Basalt are examples of: / ग्रेनाइट और बेसाल्ट किसके उदाहरण हैं:
questions.explanation: Both are common examples of igneous rocks (one intrusive, one extrusive).

questions.question: 96. Which is an active volcano on the border of Argentina & Chile? / अर्जेंटीना और चिली की सीमा पर कौन सा सक्रिय ज्वालामुखी है?
questions.explanation: Ojos-del-salado is explicitly mentioned as being on the border of Argentina & Chile.

questions.question: 97. Which is an active volcano in Ecuador? / इक्वाडोर में कौन सा सक्रिय ज्वालामुखी है?
questions.explanation: Cotopaxi is the active volcano listed for Ecuador.

questions.question: 98. Which of these rocks is formed from physical and chemical changes to other rocks? / इनमें से कौन सी चट्टान अन्य चट्टानों में भौतिक और रासायनिक परिवर्तनों से बनती है?
questions.explanation: Metamorphic rocks are defined by the transformation of pre-existing rocks (protoliths).

questions.question: 99. Which volcano is located in Indonesia? / कौन सा ज्वालामुखी इंडोनेशिया में स्थित है?
questions.explanation: Krakatoa is listed as a dormant volcano in Indonesia.

questions.question: 100. The term 'Protolith' is associated with: / 'प्रोटोलिथ' शब्द किससे संबंधित है:
questions.explanation: The protolith is the original rock that gets 'metamorphosed' or changed.
